line_1: As storms and thunders rattling with loud peal,
line_2: As in some free and well-pois'd common-weal

line_1: How sweet the tuneful bells' responsive peal!
line_2: So piercing to my heart their force I feel!

line_1: Sounds in his chimney top a doleful peal,
line_2: Midst pouring rain, or gusts of rattling hail;
